creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #13)

This trick worked for me. Now I have a sound in the www/flashplayer (firefox). So the problem is in the linux-c7-alsa-lib and/or linux-c7-alsa-plugins-oss?
